title: Dutch athlete wins first shot put world title with dramatic final throw in Tokyo
title_zh: 荷兰运动员在东京以戏剧性的最后一掷赢得首个铅球世界冠军
description: Jessica Schilder became the first Dutch athlete to win a world title in shot put Saturday, capturing gold at the Japan National Stadium in Tokyo with a decisive final throw of 20.29 meters.
description_zh: 周六，杰西卡·希尔德 (Jessica Schilder) 成为首位赢得铅球世界冠军的荷兰运动员，她在东京日本国家体育场以 20.29 米的决定性最后一掷夺得金牌。

title: Dutch comedian goes viral with Disney satire over Kimmel sacking
title_zh: 荷兰喜剧演员因讽刺迪士尼解雇吉米·坎摩尔而走红
description: A short video satirising Disney’s decision to pull a popular talk show because of the host’s comments on the murder...
description_zh: 一段简短的视频讽刺了迪士尼因主持人对谋杀案的评论而决定取消一档热门脱口秀节目……

title: Dutch insurers probe nursing home dental chains over rising costs and care concerns
title_zh: 荷兰保险公司对养老院牙科连锁店展开调查，称成本上涨和护理问题令人担忧
description: Several Dutch health insurers have launched investigations into dental care in nursing homes after reports that commercial dental chains may be profiting from unnecessary treatments.
description_zh: 有报道称商业牙科连锁店可能从不必要的治疗中获利，几家荷兰健康保险公司已对养老院的牙科护理展开调查。

title: Three Dutch cities maintain housing priority for asylum permit holders despite new law
title_zh: 尽管新法律出台，荷兰三座城市仍为庇护许可持有者提供住房优先权
description: Three of the Netherlands’ 20 largest municipalities—Amsterdam, Arnhem, and Haarlem—plan to continue giving priority to asylum seekers who have received residence permits for social housing, even if
description_zh: 荷兰 20 个最大城市中的三个——阿姆斯特丹、阿纳姆和哈勒姆——计划继续优先考虑已获得社会住房居留许可的寻求庇护者，即使

title: Politicians condemn riots at anti-immigration demo in The Hague
title_zh: 政界人士谴责海牙反移民示威骚乱
description: Riots broke out at an anti-immigration protest in The Hague as demonstrators set a police car on fire and smashed...
description_zh: 海牙反移民抗议活动爆发骚乱，示威者焚烧并砸毁了一辆警车……

title: Dutch Finance Ministry: higher tobacco taxes yield no extra revenue
title_zh: 荷兰财政部：提高烟草税不会带来额外收入
description: The Dutch government’s tobacco tax hikes no longer increase state revenue, largely due to cross-border cigarette purchases, according to a Ministry of Finance report published on Prinsjesdag.
description_zh: 根据荷兰财政部在王子日发布的报告，荷兰政府提高烟草税不再增加国家收入，这主要是由于跨境香烟购买。

title: Schilder wins second Dutch athletics gold in last shot put round
title_zh: 施尔德在最后一轮铅球比赛中赢得荷兰第二枚田径金牌
description: Jessica Schilder claimed a second gold medal for the Netherlands at the world athletics championships with her last throw of...
description_zh: 杰西卡·施尔德 (Jessica Schilder) 在世界田径锦标赛上凭借最后一投的出色表现，为荷兰赢得了第二枚金牌……

title: Police stop two drivers in Noord-Brabant for extreme speeds in separate incidents
title_zh: 北布拉班特省警方分别拦下两名超速行驶的司机
description: Two drivers were stopped in separate incidents in Noord-Brabant on Friday after being caught at extreme speeds, police said. Both cases are under further review by prosecutors.
description_zh: 警方称，周五，两名司机在北布拉班特省因超速行驶被分别拦下。这两起案件正在接受检察官的进一步审查。

title: Dutch instruments track rare asteroid explosion over Normandy
title_zh: 荷兰仪器追踪诺曼底上空罕见的小行星爆炸
description: Sensitive Dutch instruments detected the explosion of a small asteroid over France in February 2023, providing unprecedented data on the behavior of cosmic impacts, the Royal Netherlands Meteorolog
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象局表示，2023 年 2 月，荷兰灵敏的仪器探测到了一颗小行星在法国上空爆炸，为宇宙撞击行为提供了前所未有的数据。

title: Anti-immigration protesters storm A12 in The Hague, clash with police
title_zh: 反移民抗议者冲击海牙 A12 高速公路，与警方发生冲突
description: An anti-immigration protest in The Hague turned violent Saturday after a group of demonstrators left the Malieveld and stormed the A12 highway, triggering clashes with police, according to
description_zh: 据报道，周六，一群示威者离开马利维尔德，冲上 A12 高速公路，引发与警方的冲突，随后海牙的反移民抗议活动演变成暴力事件。

title: Rotterdam police stop 115 drivers for alcohol or drug use in overnight operation
title_zh: 鹿特丹警方夜间行动拦截了 115 名酒驾或毒驾司机
description: In a large-scale police operation overnight, 115 drivers in Rotterdam were caught driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs, authorities reported Saturday.
description_zh: 鹿特丹警方周六报告称，在夜间的大规模警方行动中，有 115 名司机在酒驾或毒驾的情况下被抓获。

title: Court upholds abortions clinic protest ban but overturns ban on talking to visitors
title_zh: 法院维持堕胎诊所抗议禁令，但推翻与访客交谈的禁令
description: A Dutch court has ruled that the mayor of Heemstede was justified in banning protests directly in front of the Bloemenhove abortion clinic, but that prohibiting demonstrators from speaking to peopl
description_zh: 荷兰一家法院裁定，海姆斯泰德市长禁止在布卢门霍夫堕胎诊所前举行抗议活动是合理的，但禁止示威者与人交谈

title: Armed men rob Doorwerth gas station, threaten employee
title_zh: 武装人员抢劫 Doorwerth 加油站，威胁员工
description: Two men held up a gas station on Van der Molenallee in Doorwerth, Gelderland, on Friday evening, threatening an employee with a firearm and demanding cash and tobacco, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，周五晚上，两名男子抢劫了位于海尔德兰省多尔韦特范德莫伦大街的一家加油站，用枪威胁一名员工，并索要现金和烟草。

title: Thousands of Dutch heading to October Fest despite pricier beer
title_zh: 尽管啤酒价格上涨，仍有数千名荷兰人前往十月节
description: Despite rising beer prices, thousands of Dutch travelers are heading to Munich this year to celebrate October Fest, according to a survey by the ANP news agency.
description_zh: 据荷兰ANP通讯社调查显示，尽管啤酒价格上涨，但今年仍有数千名荷兰游客前往慕尼黑庆祝十月节。

title: Shaken residents describe panic after The Hague explosion that killed 1, injured 12
title_zh: 海牙爆炸致 1 人死亡，12 人受伤，震惊的居民描述了爆炸后的恐慌
description: Hours after adeadly explosionat a Hengelolaan apartment building in The Hague’s Haagse Hout district, resi
description_zh: 海牙 Haagse Hout 区的一栋 Hengelolaan 公寓楼发生致命爆炸数小时后，

title: Suspect arrested after "violent attempted break-in" at Israeli Embassy in The Hague
title_zh: 以色列驻海牙大使馆“企图暴力闯入”后嫌疑人被捕
description: Police arrested a suspect Friday evening following an incident at the Israeli embassy in The Hague, authorities said. The embassy described the incident as a “violent attempt at a break-in.”
description_zh: 当局称，周五晚间，以色列驻海牙大使馆发生一起事件后，警方逮捕了一名嫌疑人。大使馆称该事件是“暴力闯入企图”。

title: Massive power outage strikes The Hague, over 32,000 lose electricity
title_zh: 海牙发生大规模停电，超过32,000户断电
description: A major power outage early Saturday morning left more than 32,000 people in The Hague without electricity, disrupting homes, streetlights, and traffic signals across multiple neighborhoods, officia
description_zh: 官方称，周六凌晨发生大规模停电，导致海牙超过 32,000 人断电，多个街区的房屋、路灯和交通信号中断

title: Zoetermeer school janitor suspected of child sex abuse; Previously reported 2 years ago
title_zh: 佐特尔梅尔学校看门人涉嫌性侵儿童；两年前曾被报道过
description: A janitor at a Zoetermeer primary school was arrested early this month on suspicion of sexually abusing two girls and possession and production of child pornography, the Public Prosecutio
description_zh: 检察机关表示，本月初，祖特梅尔小学的一名看门人因涉嫌性侵两名女孩以及持有和制作儿童色情制品而被捕。

title: Five parties barred from Dutch parliamentary elections, 28 candidates removed
title_zh: 五个政党被禁止参加荷兰议会选举，28名候选人被取消资格
description: The Dutch Electoral Council has barred five political parties from participating in the Tweede Kamerelectio
description_zh: 荷兰选举委员会禁止五个政党参加荷兰国民议会选举

title: Utrecht seal now chilling in Amsterdam canals
title_zh: 乌得勒支海豹现藏于阿姆斯特丹运河
description: The seal that previouslyspent several days in Utrechthas swum to Amsterdam’s inland waterways.
description_zh: 这只海豹之前在乌得勒支呆了几天，后来游到了阿姆斯特丹的内陆水道。

title: Dutch researchers find millions-year-old dinosaur egg shell in United States
title_zh: 荷兰研究人员在美国发现数百万年前的恐龙蛋壳
description: Scientists from the Oertijdmuseum in Boxtel have discovered a million-year-old dinosaur eggshell in the United States.
description_zh: 美国博克斯特尔奥尔蒂博物馆的科学家在美国发现了一枚有百万年历史的恐龙蛋壳。

title: More professionals choosing to teach in vocational education
title_zh: 更多专业人士选择在职业教育领域任教
description: The number of professionals moving into teaching roles in secondary vocational education (MBO) has doubled over the past decade, now exceeding 800 annually, according to the Inspectorate of Educati
description_zh: 根据教育督察局的数据，过去十年，进入中等职业教育（MBO）教学岗位的专业人员数量翻了一番，目前每年超过 800 人。

title: Dutch municipalities demand national pesticide rules in lily cultivation
title_zh: 荷兰各市政当局要求在百合种植中制定国家农药规则
description: Municipalities in Noord-Holland, Limburg, and Drenthe are calling on the national government to set clear regulations on pesticide use in lily cultivation.
description_zh: 北荷兰省、林堡省和德伦特省的市政当局呼吁国家政府制定有关百合种植中农药使用的明确规定。

title: Dutch branch of retailer Carpetright declared bankrupt; Hundreds of jobs in jeopardy
title_zh: 零售商 Carpetright 荷兰分公司宣布破产；数百个工作岗位岌岌可危
description: The Dutch arm of retail chain Carpetright was declared bankrupt in the District Court of Amsterdam on Friday, according to law firm Okkerse & Schop Advocaten.
description_zh: 据 Okkerse & Schop Advocaten 律师事务所称，零售连锁店 Carpetright 的荷兰分公司于周五在阿姆斯特丹地方法院被宣告破产。

title: d4vd concerts in Amsterdam cancelled after discovery of child's remains in singer's car
title_zh: d4vd 阿姆斯特丹演唱会因歌手车内发现儿童遗体而取消
description: Two Amsterdam concert venues cancelled scheduled performances by d4vd after the discovery of a badly decomposing body found in a vehicle registered to the American singer, whose legal name is David
description_zh: 在美国歌手大卫·德·金的车辆中发现了一具严重腐烂的尸体后，阿姆斯特丹的两家演唱会场馆取消了 d4vd 的原定演出。

title: One killed, 12 hurt in apartment explosion in The Hague
title_zh: 海牙公寓爆炸致一人死亡，十二人受伤
description: One person was killed in an explosion at an apartment building in The Hague that left several others injured.
description_zh: 海牙一栋公寓楼发生爆炸，造成一人死亡，多人受伤。

title: Digital euro could be introduced in 2026, said Dutch Finance Minister
title_zh: 荷兰财政部长表示，数字欧元可能于 2026 年推出
description: In the "most ambitious scenario," the digital euro could be introduced in 2026, said caretaker Finance Minister Eelco Heinen In Copenhagen on Friday.
description_zh: 看守财政部长埃尔科·海宁周五在哥本哈根表示，在“最雄心勃勃的情况下”，数字欧元可能于 2026 年推出。

title: Police close case into three found dead in Alkmaar family home; No prosecutions expected
title_zh: 阿尔克马尔家中发现三具尸体，警方结案；预计不会提起诉讼
description: The police investigation into the deaths of three people whose remains were found inside a home in Alkmaar has been completed, and no suspects will be prosecuted in connection with the matter, a po
description_zh: 警方对在阿尔克马尔一所房屋内发现的三人死亡事件的调查已经完成，不会对与此事有关的嫌疑人提起诉讼，

title: Two children trapped between bus and light pole in accident at Hague amusement park
title_zh: 海牙游乐园发生事故，两名儿童被困在巴士和灯杆之间
description: A field trip for primary school children to the Drievliet Family Park got off to a bad start on Friday.
description_zh: 周五，小学生前往 Drievliet 家庭公园的实地考察之旅开局不利。

title: Cheers: science shows alcohol does help you speak better Dutch
title_zh: 欢呼：科学表明酒精确实能帮助你更好地说荷兰语
description: Researchers at Maastricht University have won one of this year’s Ig Nobel prizes, awarded for scientific achievements that first make...
description_zh: 马斯特里赫特大学的研究人员获得了今年的搞笑诺贝尔奖之一，该奖项旨在表彰首次取得科学成就的研究人员......

title: Golden girl: Femke Bol retains world 400 metres hurdles title
title_zh: 金牌女孩：费姆克·波尔卫冕世界400米栏冠军
description: Femke Bol retained her 400 metres hurdles world title at the World Athletics Championships in Tokyo on Friday. Bol took...
description_zh: 周五，费姆克·波尔在东京举行的世界田径锦标赛上卫冕了400米栏世界冠军。波尔……

title: PostNL starts delivering some packages to U.S. again
title_zh: PostNL 恢复向美国递送部分包裹
description: Dutch postal carrier PostNL will once again ship a large portion of packages destined for the United States starting on Friday, but for the time being the service restart will primarily a
description_zh: 荷兰邮政公司 PostNL 将从周五开始再次运送大部分发往美国的包裹，但目前服务重启将主要

title: Femke Bol takes 400m hurdles gold in Tokyo; Ties Sifan Hassan for all-time medal record
title_zh: 费姆克·波尔在东京夺得 400 米栏金牌；追平西凡·哈桑的奖牌纪录
description: Femke Bol won the world title in the 400-meter hurdles for the second time in a row at the 2025 World Athletics Championships in Tokyo on Friday.
description_zh: 周五，费姆克·波尔在东京举行的 2025 年世界田径锦标赛上连续第二次夺得 400 米栏世界冠军。

title: Podcast: The Three Vodka Scheveningen Challenge Edition
title_zh: 播客：三种伏特加席凡宁根挑战版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想要支持 DutchNews 播客并持续供应我们的荷兰焦糖华夫饼和橙子番茄酱吗？点击此处成为……

title: Mass litter picking day attempts to deal with mess in Amsterdam
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹举办大型垃圾收集日，试图解决城市混乱问题
description: More than 9,000 Amsterdammers took to the streets on Friday in a community clean-up day aimed at ridding the city...
description_zh: 周五，超过 9,000 名阿姆斯特丹居民走上街头，参加社区清洁日，旨在清除城市垃圾……

title: On the shoulders of ancestors: Moluccans in the Netherlands
title_zh: 站在祖先的肩膀上：荷兰的摩鹿加人
description: The Moluccan military who fought for the Dutch in Indonesia had to fight once more for their rights in the...
description_zh: 曾在印度尼西亚为荷兰人作战的摩鹿加军队不得不再次为自己的权利而战……

title: Two boys arrested for sending threatening email to Almere secondary school
title_zh: 两名男孩因向阿尔梅勒中学发送威胁邮件而被捕
description: The police have arrested two boys on suspicion of threatening the Oostvaarders College in Almere.
description_zh: 警方逮捕了两名涉嫌威胁阿尔梅勒 Oostvaarders 学院的男孩。

title: Amsterdam may go ahead with medicinal crack trial in 2027
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹或将于 2027 年开展药用可卡因试验
description: Amsterdam local council is looking into providing medicinal crack to a small group of addicts in an attempt to give...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹地方议会正在考虑向一小部分吸毒者提供药用快克毒品，以期……

title: Russia appealing against MH17 convictionn at International Court of Justice
title_zh: 俄罗斯就MH17事件定罪向国际法院提出上诉
description: Russia is appealing to the International Court of Justice (ICJ) to challenge the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Council’s ruling on MH17, the state news agency Tass repo
description_zh: 据俄罗斯国家通讯社塔斯社报道，俄罗斯正在向国际法院 (ICJ) 上诉，挑战国际民航组织 (ICAO) 理事会对 MH17 航班的裁决。

title: Amsterdam residents aviold several city parks, shopping streets, bike tunnels at night
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹居民晚上会避开几个城市公园、购物街和自行车隧道
description: After a survey showed that85 percent of Amsterdam women avoid certain parts of the cityat
description_zh: 一项调查显示，85% 的阿姆斯特丹女性会避开城市的某些区域

title: Most bullied children don't seek help from teachers, study finds
title_zh: 研究发现，大多数受欺负的孩子不会向老师寻求帮助
description: The vast majority, 70 percent, of children who are bullied at school don’t tell their teacher.
description_zh: 绝大多数（70%）在学校遭受欺凌的孩子不会告诉老师。

title: Police arrest two teens over threatening email to Almere school
title_zh: 警方逮捕两名向阿尔梅勒学校发送威胁邮件的青少年
description: Police have arrested two teenagers from Dronten and Almere suspected of sending an e-mail containing “a serious threat” to a...
description_zh: 警方逮捕了来自德龙滕和阿尔梅勒的两名青少年，他们涉嫌向……发送包含“严重威胁”的电子邮件。

title: This year could become the sunniest on record in the Netherlands
title_zh: 今年可能成为荷兰有记录以来阳光最充足的一年
description: 2025 is in the running to become one of the sunniest years in the Netherlands' records. So far this year, the country has had 1,817 hours of sunshine.
description_zh: 2025年有望成为荷兰有记录以来阳光最充足的年份之一。今年迄今为止，荷兰的日照时长已达1817小时。

title: More women to carry warning device in anti stalking trial
title_zh: 反跟踪试验将增加女性携带警告装置的比例
description: A trial to give women a device which warns them their stalker is near is going to be extended, the...
description_zh: 一项为女性提供警告她们跟踪者就在附近的设备的试验即将延长，...

title: Secondary teachers getting sicker: report by Voion
title_zh: Voion 报告：中学教师患病率上升
description: Sick leave has risen among teachers in secondary education, according to educational labour market expert Voion. In a new report,...
description_zh: 教育劳动力市场专家沃伊恩指出，中学教师的病假率有所上升。在一份新报告中……

title: Border checks, burqa ban, and Gaza kids: Over 60 motions filed on budget
title_zh: 边境检查、禁止穿戴罩袍和加沙儿童：预算案已提交 60 多项议案
description: The Tweede Kamer, the lower house of the Dutch parliament, concluded the budget debate by voting on over 60 motions filed on the Budget Day documents.
description_zh: 荷兰议会下院对预算日文件中提出的 60 多项动议进行了表决，结束了预算辩论。

title: Third of women in Netherlands have an abusive partner or ex
title_zh: 荷兰三分之一的女性有虐待伴侣或前任
description: A third of women in the Netherlands have been or still are in a physically abusive relationship. One in seven feared physical violence from their partner or ex in recent years.
description_zh: 三分之一的荷兰女性曾经或现在仍处于身体虐待的关系中。七分之一的女性近年来担心受到伴侣或前任的身体暴力。

title: Consumer watchdog encourages consumers to report fake discounts
title_zh: 消费者监督机构鼓励消费者举报虚假折扣
description: Consumer watchdog ACM has told businesses to stop “misleading” reductions listing prices for goods that have never been charged. Strict...
description_zh: 消费者监督机构ACM已要求企业停止对从未收取过费用的商品进行“误导性”降价。严格……

title: Prisoners may be released even earlier for lack of space: NOS
title_zh: NOS：由于空间不足，囚犯可能提前获释
description: A measure to relieve pressure on prison capacity by releasing some prisoners two weeks before their sentence has been completed...
description_zh: 为缓解监狱容量压力，在部分囚犯刑期结束前两周释放他们，采取了一项措施……

title: Farming minister reverses rule to cut pig and chicken farming
title_zh: 农业部长撤销削减养猪和养鸡业的规定
description: Caretaker agriculture minister Femke Wiersma has reversed a rule on manure production that would have ensured a cut in the...
description_zh: 看守农业部长 Femke Wiersma 推翻了有关粪肥生产的规定，该规定原本可以确保减少……

title: Burqa ban? Election campaign starts in votes on budget motions
title_zh: 禁止罩袍？预算案表决拉开竞选序幕
description: Burqas could be banned everywhere in the Netherlands, if the results of a late-night vote in parliament ever become law....
description_zh: 如果议会深夜投票的结果成为法律，那么荷兰各地可能会禁止穿戴罩袍......

title: Ig Nobel prize for study showing that drunk Germans speak Dutch better than sober ones
title_zh: 搞笑诺贝尔奖颁给一项研究，该研究表明醉酒的德国人比清醒的人更能说荷兰语
description: Dutch Courage can help you speak a foreign language, according to a study by Dutch, English, and German researchers that was awarded an
description_zh: 根据荷兰、英国和德国研究人员的一项研究，荷兰勇气可以帮助你学会一门外语，该研究获得了

title: Dutch parliament wants to follow U.S. example and label Antifa a terrorist organization
title_zh: 荷兰议会希望效仿美国，将“反法西斯主义”列为恐怖组织
description: A majority in the lower house of the Dutch parliament wants the Netherlands to follow the United States’ lead and designate the far-left Antifa movement as a terrorist organization.
description_zh: 荷兰议会下院多数议员希望荷兰效仿美国，将极左翼“反法西斯”运动列为恐怖组织。

title: 400 passengers evacuated after fire alarm on train near Rotterdam
title_zh: 鹿特丹附近火车发生火警，400名乘客紧急疏散
description: Around 400 passengers had to be evacuated after a fire alarm on an intercity train on the high-speed line between Rotterdam and Breda on Thursday evening.
description_zh: 周四晚上，鹿特丹和布雷达之间的高速铁路城际列车发生火警，约 400 名乘客被迫疏散。

title: First hearing set in case of teen Lisa’s murder, Amsterdam court confirms
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹法院确认，少女丽莎谋杀案将举行首次听证会
description: The Amsterdam court has announced that the first public hearing in the case of the suspect accused of killing 17-year-old Lisa will be held on November 25.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹法院宣布，将于11月25日就被控杀害17岁女孩丽莎的嫌疑人一案举行首次公开听证会。

title: Dutch army doesn't have the capacity to train all the soldiers its recruiting: report
title_zh: 报告称荷兰军队无力训练所有新兵
description: The Dutch Armed Forces have to grow, and recruitment is going great. In the first eight months of this year, the number of personnel grew by around 5,000 people.
description_zh: 荷兰武装部队规模亟待扩大，征兵工作进展顺利。今年前八个月，部队规模增长了约5000人。

title: Tesla leasing firm in crisis after losing €41.3 million in value due to used car prices
title_zh: 特斯拉租赁公司因二手车价格下跌而损失 4130 万欧元，陷入危机
description: Dutch Tesla leasing firm MisterGreen is fighting for survival after slashing 41.3 million euros from the value of its fleet in 2023, as falling used car prices triggered heavy losses and forced tak
description_zh: 荷兰特斯拉租赁公司 MisterGreen 正在为生存而战，因为二手车价格下跌导致其车队价值在 2023 年缩水 4130 万欧元，并被迫

title: Dutch government won't label Gaza war as genocide after UN report
title_zh: 联合国报告后，荷兰政府不会将加沙战争定性为种族灭绝
description: The Dutch government will not endorse a United Nations report accusing Israel of committing genocide in the Gaza Strip.
description_zh: 荷兰政府不会认可联合国指责以色列在加沙地带实施种族灭绝的报告。

title: Temps set to rise to 27°C on Friday, cooling back down by Sunday
title_zh: 周五气温将升至 27°C，周日将回落
description: Temperatures are set to rise to 27 degrees Celsius on Friday. This will follow temperatures of 19 to 20 degrees Celsius this afternoon.
description_zh: 周五气温预计将升至27摄氏度。今天下午气温将达到19至20摄氏度。

title: Unemployment in the Netherlands rose slightly in August
title_zh: 荷兰八月份失业率略有上升
description: The unemployment rate in the Netherlands rose slightly compared to the previous month, Statistics Netherlands has reported. Last month, 3.9 percent of the labor force was without paid work.
description_zh: 荷兰统计局报告称，荷兰失业率较上月略有上升。上个月，3.9%的劳动力没有工作。

title: Amsterdam and Utrecht release 2026 budgets: keep taxes steady, plan to invest in housing
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹和乌得勒支发布2026年预算：保持税收稳定，计划投资住房
description: The mayor and aldermen working in both Amsterdam and Utrecht introduced their 2026 municipal budgets this week, with the two cities intending to prioritize social support, housing, infrastructure,
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹和乌得勒支的市长和市议员本周公布了 2026 年的市政预算，两市计划优先考虑社会支持、住房、基础设施、

title: Man, 57, sentenced to 10 years in prison for murdering his girlfriend in Heemskerk
title_zh: 一名 57 岁男子因在 Heemskerk 谋杀女友被判入狱 10 年
description: The court in Haarlem sentenced 57-year-old Marco S. to 10 years in prison on Thursday for the murder of his 60-year-old girlfriend in Heemskerk in December 2023.
description_zh: 哈勒姆法院周四判处 57 岁的马可·S 10 年监禁，罪名是 2023 年 12 月在希姆斯科克谋杀其 60 岁的女友。

title: Kickboxer Badr Hari sentenced to community service for assaulting ex-wife
title_zh: 跆拳道运动员巴德尔·哈里因殴打前妻被判社区服务
description: The kickboxer Badr Hari has been sentenced to 24 hours of community service for assault, the Public Prosecution Service (OM) confirmed Thursday, following reports from Het Parool.
description_zh: 公共检察院 (OM) 周四根据 Het Parool 的报道证实，跆拳道运动员巴德尔·哈里因袭击罪被判处 24 小时社区服务。

title: Spanish authorities release Ridouan Taghi's relative; extradition now under review
title_zh: 西班牙当局释放了 Ridouan Taghi 的亲戚；引渡正在审查中
description: Firass T., 24, a relative of the main suspect in theMarengo case, Ri
description_zh: Firass T.，24 岁，马伦戈案主要嫌疑人的亲戚，Ri

title: U.S. oil giant cancels €100 million plastic recycling projects in the Netherlands
title_zh: 美国石油巨头取消荷兰1亿欧元塑料回收项目
description: ExxonMobil is scrapping 100 million euros of investments into plastic recycling projects in Rotterdam and Antwerp. The U.S.
description_zh: 埃克森美孚公司将取消对鹿特丹和安特卫普塑料回收项目的1亿欧元投资。美国

title: Storm topples speed cameras that catches drivers using phones, all units disabled
title_zh: 暴风雨摧毁了用于抓拍司机使用手机的测速摄像头，所有摄像头均瘫痪
description: The Netherlands has temporarily disabled its “focusflitsers,” mobile speed cameras that detect drivers using phones, after one toppled onto the N50 near Kampen during the first
description_zh: 荷兰已暂时关闭其“focusflitsers”移动测速摄像头，该摄像头可检测司机使用手机的情况，此前在第一次发生事故时，一辆摄像头倒在坎彭附近的 N50 公路上。

title: PM Schoof questioned as witness in case against man suspected of leaking state secrets
title_zh: 总理舒夫作为涉嫌泄露国家机密男子案的证人接受质询
description: Caretaker Prime Minister Dick Schoof has beenquestioned as a witnessin a trial against
description_zh: 看守总理迪克·舒夫在针对

title: Friday will be warm and sunny but the rain will return soon
title_zh: 周五天气温暖晴朗，但很快又会下雨
description: Friday is set to be a summery day with temperatures reaching up to 29° in the far south, as warm...
description_zh: 周五将是夏季的一天，最南部地区的气温将达到 29°，因为温暖……

title: Amsterdam starts “bin offensive” to remove offensive bins
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹发起“垃圾桶攻势”清除令人反感的垃圾桶
description: Amsterdam is going to remove litter bins from crowded locations to prevent accumulations of rubbish in the capital, deputy mayor...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹副市长表示，为了防止首都垃圾堆积，阿姆斯特丹将从人群密集的地方移除垃圾箱……

title: Uutje and Aatje? Utrecht and Amsterdam visited by seal
title_zh: 乌特耶和阿特耶？海豹造访乌得勒支和阿姆斯特丹
description: Rowers at the Park Somerlust rowing club in Amsterdam have spotted a seal basking on a jetty on Thursday, local...
description_zh: 当地时间周四，阿姆斯特丹 Park Somerlust 赛艇俱乐部的赛艇运动员发现一只海豹在码头上晒太阳……

title: The English abroad – exhibition tells tales of historic gap year
title_zh: 海外英语展讲述历史性的间隔年故事
description: Rowdy English tourists might have been told to “stay away” from modern Amsterdam, but British tourism was once viewed in...
description_zh: 吵闹的英国游客可能被告知要“远离”现代阿姆斯特丹，但英国旅游业曾被视为......

title: VVD drops further in the polls; Now about equal to D66, JA21
title_zh: VVD 在民意调查中进一步下滑；目前与 D66、JA21 持平
description: The VVD, D66, and JA21 are converging in terms of seats in a new Ipsos I&O poll.
description_zh: 在益普索 I&O 最新民意调查中，VVD、D66 和 JA21 在席位方面势均力敌。

title: Women often hide period pain, menopause symptoms at work
title_zh: 女性经常在工作中隐藏痛经和更年期症状
description: This year, 80 percent of female employees sometimes or regularly experience hormone-related complaints such as period pain, morning sickness from pregnancy, or difficulty concentrating du
description_zh: 今年，80% 的女性员工有时会或经常遇到与激素相关的问题，例如痛经、孕吐或注意力难以集中。

title: Nearly a quarter of homes sold again within five years
title_zh: 近四分之一的房屋在五年内再次出售
description: Netherlands residents are changing homes faster. So far this year, almost a quarter of homes sold have been in the owners’ possession for less than five years.
description_zh: 荷兰居民更换住房的速度正在加快。今年迄今为止，售出的房屋中近四分之一的业主持有时间不到五年。

title: Few questions for PM Schoof to answer on second day of budget debate
title_zh: 预算辩论第二天，舒夫总理需要回答的几个问题
description: Typically, the second day of the budget debate is reserved for the Prime Minister and Cabinet to answer parliament’s questions about next year’s budget.
description_zh: 通常，预算辩论的第二天由总理和内阁回答议会关于明年预算的问题。

title: Alkmaar family not killed by a third party, police say
title_zh: 警方称阿尔克马尔一家人并非被第三方杀害
description: Three persons found dead in a family homein Alkmaar on Wednesday “did not
description_zh: 周三在阿尔克马尔一户人家中发现的三名死者“没有

title: Amsterdam to join experiment with GPS device for stalking, domestic violence victims
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹将加入 GPS 设备试验，为跟踪和家庭暴力受害者提供帮助
description: The municipality of Amsterdam wants to join an experiment with a GPS device designed to protect victims of domestic violence or stalking.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市政府希望参与一项旨在保护家庭暴力或跟踪受害者的 GPS 设备实验。
